assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-25 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table. Line 24: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and line 25: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-33 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC' (line 29), 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432' (line 30), 'Feature issue type ID: 10142' (line 31), 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875' (line 32), 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747' (line 33).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 35: '## Code Intelligence' and line 37: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' The naming convention is documented with an example on lines 39-46.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 48: '### Limitations' appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 35), making it a subsection under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 8-10: '### Serena Instances Discovered' with '1. **serena_backend** — discovered from tool prefix `mcp__serena_backend__*` (10 tools found...)' and '2. **serena_ui** — discovered from tool prefix `mcp__serena_ui__*` (10 tools found...)'. Source is identified on line 5 as 'MCP tool listing'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md 'Preserved (Existing Content)' section (lines 3-9) lists '# my-project heading and description', '## Documentation section', and '## Getting Started section' as preserved. 'Added (New Content)' section (lines 11-34) lists all 4 Project Configuration sections as new: '## Repository Registry' (item 1), '## Jira Configuration' (item 2), '## Code Intelligence' (item 3), '## Bug Configuration' (item 4). All four configuration sections are marked as newly added.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 22: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — these are the exact four column headers matching the expected structure.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 52-56: '## Bug Configuration' with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001' (line 54), 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md' (line 55), 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' (line 56). All three fields match the expected values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file (the file ends at line 57 with Bug Configuration). The discovery-log.md line 42 confirms: 'User declined to enable security triage for this project — section not included'. The changes-log.md line 38 also confirms: 'Security Configuration — user declined to enable security triage'.
